calendar.matters:
ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2012 Off Calendar

ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2012 Continued To Aug-30-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503

ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-08-2012 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-28-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503

ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-11-2012 Continued To Jan-12-12 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 602

ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-12-2012 Continued To Jan-18-12 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 602
MINI MINUTES: Judge Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Reporter Kelly Roemer CSR #6435. (602)

APPEARANCES:
James Nevin and Chris Hersom of Brayton Purcell representing the plaintiffs.
Felicia Feng and Lisa Oberg of McKenna, Long & Aldridge representing CertainTeed Corporation.

At 11:28 a.m., this matter comes on calendar for the plaintiffs' motion to consolidate. The court issues a tentative ruling to grant the motion stating that most factor are met under the Marcum criteria. The court hears argument.

At 12:04 p.m., the motion is GRANTED and the cases are consolidated for trial (Marcum-275078, Siegel-456189 and Cody-275532). A status conference will be conducted 1/18/12 at 2:30 p.m. All motions in limine must be filed by 1/18/12. A witness list with scope-of-testimony descriptions must also be submitted to the court by 1/18/12.

At 12:08 p.m., matter is adjourned.

ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-10-2012 Continued To Jan-12-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 602
MINI MINUTES: Judge Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not Reported. (602)

APPEARANCES:
James Nevin and Chris Hersom of Brayton Purcell representing the plaintiffs.
Felicia Feng of McKenna, Long & Aldridge representing CertainTeed Corporation.

At 10:06 a.m., this matter comes on calendar for a status conference. Court and counsel confer on plaintiff's motion to consolidate as well as motions in limine to be heard before trial. The defendants oppose the motion to consolidate. Defendants must file opposition by tomorrow, 1/11/12. The motion will be heard 1/12/12 at 2:00 p.m.

The deadline for settlement is 1/18/12 at 2:00 p.m. Hardship will be conducted 1/19/12. The statute of limitation deadline for Siegel (456189) is 2/8/12.

At 10:20 a.m., this matter is adjourned.

MOTION To Compel Deft Certainteed Corporation To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition
Off Calendar Sep-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Gilbert L. Purcell, Esq., of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / moving party Andrea Cody
Felicia Y. Feng, Esq., of McKENNA LONG & ALDRIDGE (415-267-4175), appearing for defendant / opposing party Certainteed Corporation

RULING:
PLAINTIFF ANDREA CODY'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFT CERTAINTEED CORPORATION TO PRODUCE ITS CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS AND PERSON MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE FOR DEPOSITION AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS AT DEPOSITION

No argument was made and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion to compel defendant Certainteed Corporation to produce is custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and to produce documents at deposition and for sanctions is denied. Discovery is closed and plaintiff failed to move to take discovery within 30 days of trial. (See C.C.P. 2024.020(a) and 2024.050; Pelton-Shepherd Industries v. Delta Packaging Products (2008) 165 Cal.App.4th 1568). Moreover, plaintiff did not demonstrate that it met and conferred in good faith before filing this motion. All requests for sanctions are denied. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Matter not reported = (220/HEK)
